scripts.build:workbench: npm --prefix workbench install && npm --prefix workbench run build
scripts.build:all: npm run build:engine-artifacts && npm run build:workbench
scripts.deploy:workbench:fresh: npm run build:wasm && npm run deploy:workbench
scripts.deploy:workbench: npm run build:workbench && npx wrangler pages deploy workbench/dist
scripts.deploy:workbench:preview: npm run build:workbench && npx wrangler pages deploy workbench/dist --branch preview
